title: Curro Mossel Bay: A legacy of excellence in education
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Curro Mossel Bay, we are...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Curro Mossel Bay, we are immensely proud of our learners' outstanding achievements and the exceptional education environment we foster.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Curro Mossel Bay, we are immensely proud of our learners' outstanding achievements and the exceptional education environment we foster."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Celebrating a decade of success, our school continues to build on a legacy of excellence, consistently achieving a 100% pass rate in the IEB matric examinations for the past 10 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are equally thrilled to report that all our students also achieved 100% tertiary exemption, opening doors to further education and career opportunities.","html":"We are equally thrilled to report that all our students also achieved 100% tertiary exemption, opening doors to further education and career opportunities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A holistic education offeringCurro Mossel Bay offers a unique experience with three schools on one campus.","html":"A holistic education offering
Curro Mossel Bay offers a unique experience with three schools on one campus."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From the nurturing environment of our preschool, where babies as young as four months are cared for, to the comprehensive education provided in Afrikaans and English throughout our primary and high schools, we cater to every stage of a child's development.","html":"From the nurturing environment of our preschool, where babies as young as four months are cared for, to the comprehensive education provided in Afrikaans and English throughout our primary and high schools, we cater to every stage of a child's development."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our preschool children develop foundational skills in a safe and stimulating environment, preparing them for their future academic journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In primary school, we offer Afrikaans and English medium classes for learners from Grade R to Grade 7, allowing each child to learn the language that suits them best.","html":"In primary school, we offer Afrikaans and English medium classes for learners from Grade R to Grade 7, allowing each child to learn the language that suits them best."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our high school continues with Afrikaans and English medium classes in Grade 8 and 9, and a dual-language approach for Grade 10 to 12, ensuring that learners are well prepared for tertiary education, with a focus on academic excellence and personal development.","html":"Our high school continues with Afrikaans and English medium classes in Grade 8 and 9, and a dual-language approach for Grade 10 to 12, ensuring that learners are well prepared for tertiary education, with a focus on academic excellence and personal development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Notable achievements of our studentsThis year, we celebrated five A-aggregates, 12 B-aggregates, and an overall grade average of 66% in our matric results.","html":"Notable achievements of our students
This year, we celebrated five A-aggregates, 12 B-aggregates, and an overall grade average of 66% in our matric results."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our learners continue to excel, with outstanding results across the board.","html":"Our learners continue to excel, with outstanding results across the board."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We take great pride in the achievements of individual learners who have set themselves apart through extraordinary performances.","html":"We take great pride in the achievements of individual learners who have set themselves apart through extraordinary performances."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Amy Eunice Olivier led with seven distinctions, followed by Keenu Vermeulen with six distinctions, and Alyssa Janse van Rensburg, Irnè O'Neil and Kaitlyn Hugo, with five distinctions each.","html":"Amy Eunice Olivier led with seven distinctions, followed by Keenu Vermeulen with six distinctions, and Alyssa Janse van Rensburg, Irnè O'Neil and Kaitlyn Hugo, with five distinctions each."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pass categories: a bright future aheadOur graduates are well positioned for success in higher education, with 91.1% of learners achieving a Bachelor's Degree pass. These results reflect the high standard of education at Curro Mossel Bay, ensuring that learners are equipped for both academic and career success.","html":"Pass categories: a bright future ahead
Our graduates are well positioned for success in higher education, with 91.1% of learners achieving a Bachelor's Degree pass. These results reflect the high standard of education at Curro Mossel Bay, ensuring that learners are equipped for both academic and career success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking forwardCurro Mossel Bay remains committed to a top-quality education experience for all learners.","html":"Looking forward
Curro Mossel Bay remains committed to a top-quality education experience for all learners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We believe in fostering a love of learning, a strong work ethic, and the development of critical skills that will help our learners thrive in an ever-changing world. We don't just educate, we inspire, nurture and shape the leaders of tomorrow.","html":"We believe in fostering a love of learning, a strong work ethic, and the development of critical skills that will help our learners thrive in an ever-changing world. We don't just educate, we inspire, nurture and shape the leaders of tomorrow."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a gallery here: Curro Mossel Bay: A legacy of excellence In education"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FacilitiesWe also pride ourselves on our world-class facilities, including an artificial hockey field accredited by the Inter-national Hockey Federation, a streaming booth, gaming laboratory, robotics, and STEAMD (supporting science, technology, engineering, the arts and mathematics) facilities that enhance the holistic development of our learners and our advanced co-curricular programme.","html":"Facilities
We also pride ourselves on our world-class facilities, including an artificial hockey field accredited by the Inter-national Hockey Federation, a streaming booth, gaming laboratory, robotics, and STEAMD (supporting science, technology, engineering, the arts and mathematics) facilities that enhance the holistic development of our learners and our advanced co-curricular programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact us on","html":"For more information, contact us on"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"071 671 0123 or visit our website, www.curro.co.za.","html":"071 671 0123 or visit our website, www.curro.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
